🌙✨ EID MUBARAK ✨🌙

Fam Motors Mwanza tunawatakia Waislamu wote Eid Mubarak yenye furaha, amani, afya njema na baraka tele.

Mwenyezi Mungu azikubali ibada zetu na atujaalie kheri, mafanikio na umoja katika siku hizi za Eid.

🤲 Eid Mubarak to you and your family!

📍 Mwanza, Tanzania
📞 0755638881
📸 @fam_motors_mwanza

#EidMubarak #FamMotorsMwanza #Mwanza #EidAlAdha #BlessedEid 🚗✨
